title: Drags PVP
description: A clean and optimized Minecraft PvP resource pack made for competitive gameplay
body:
A clean PvP-focused Minecraft resource pack.
Optimized textures, custom items, and smooth visuals for better combat awareness and performance. Ideal for competitive gameplay.
This is A bacis pvp pack made by me DragDm
It has a custom sky(needs nuit) https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit
